reference: I am thirty-four years old. I found a small movable lump under my left armpit a week ago. I am expecting my period in the following couple of days and I am experiencing very severe pain in both breasts, as I often do. I have been shaving and using deodorant before noticing the lump, but I stopped that one week ago.
text: I am 34 years old. I found a small movable lump under my left armpit a week ago. I am expecting my period in the following couple of days and I am experiencing very severe pain in both breasts, as I often do. I have been shaving and using deodorant before noticing the lump, but I stopped that one week ago.
